verdict.moderator_pairing_notes: The moderator correctly identified a consensus in Round 1 (all agents leaning towards Canada) and terminated the debate process. This is the optimal decision as no disagreement existed to resolve.
verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly synthesized the evidence, noting the split in the linguistic agent but correctly prioritizing the strong regulatory and meta evidence (delineator posts) and the linguistic evidence (Nutrien) to confirm Canada.
